data.body: Ownership: the remedy for this over-invalidation bug is owned and IMPLEMENTED by Story 1 'jerky-vista-amok' (22bf), which replaces the claim_gate_check step-3 whole-HEAD exact-match with the content-addressed per-path drift check. This ticket is the failing-case report (repro/expected/actual) and CLOSES when 22bf lands; its prescriptive ACs are the acceptance test for 22bf, not a second implementation. See ADR docs/adr/0002-code-drift-invalidation.md.
